allow: PowerShell($chrome="C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; cmd /c "`"$chrome`" --headless --disable-gpu --no-sandbox --virtual-time-budget=9000 --dump-dom http://localhost:3210 > dom.html 2> chrome_err.txt"; "dom lines: " + \(\(Get-Content dom.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\); Get-Content chrome_err.txt | Where-Object { $_ -match "\(?i\)console|error|warn|uncaught|hydrat|fail|404|expected" } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell("err size: " + \(if \(Test-Path chrome_err.txt\) { \(Get-Item chrome_err.txt\).Length } else { 'none' }\); $chrome="C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; cmd /c "`"$chrome`" --headless=new --disable-gpu --no-sandbox --enable-logging=stderr --log-level=0 --virtual-time-budget=8000 --dump-dom http://localhost:3210 > nul 2> chrome_err2.txt"; "--- console lines ---"; Get-Content chrome_err2.txt | Where-Object { $_ -match "CONSOLE" } | Select-Object -First 25)

PowerShell($tmp=@\("hero_fondo.png","L.png","R.png","fin.png","fin2.png","hdr.png","hdr2.png","hdr3.png"\); $n=0; foreach\($f in $tmp\){ if\(Test-Path $f\){ Remove-Item $f -Force; $n++ } }; "removed $n"; try { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3210 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "server stopped" } catch { "no server" })
